positive: Stylized geometric woodland creatures silhouette art, featuring playful raccoons, foxes, and squirrels nestled among abstract stylized leaves and mushrooms. The composition should be highly symmetrical and balanced, creating a circular, vibrant print design. Use clean black and forest green silhouettes against a creamy off-white background, accented with pops of muted terracotta and mustard yellow accents. Graphic novel aesthetic, flat vector illustration style, perfect for apparel screen printing. High contrast, minimal shading, strong central composition.
